name: @estebanforge/pi-mixture-of-agents
description_en: Mixture of Agents for Pi. Registers a virtual `moa` provider (presets selectable in /model) and a `/moa` command that runs one-shot passes plus a drill-down preset menu. Each preset fans out N reference models in parallel over a trimmed transcript, an agg
description_zh: Pi 的代理混合。注册一个虚拟 `moa` 提供商（可在 /model 中选择预设）和一个 `/moa` 命令，该命令运行一次性传递和向下钻取预设菜单。每个预设在修剪后的转录文本上并行扩展 N 个参考模型，然后聚合
